settings.heading: Custom screen printed shirts, hoodies and spirit wear.
settings.lead: Get durable screen printing for school events, booster clubs, construction crews, restaurants, churches, teams and branded business apparel, backed by actual production photos.
settings.body:
The uploaded photos show shirts on production equipment and finished group apparel with bold color, large graphics and detailed event artwork. That makes screen printing a strong fit when a group needs repeatable shirts, clear sponsor logos and a consistent finished look.

Use screen printing for camp shirts, event shirts, spirit wear, Greek life apparel, organization campaigns, company uniforms and bulk t-shirt orders across Garland, Mesquite, Dallas and DFW.
settings.features: Shirts On Press,Full Front Graphics,Event Apparel,Group Orders,Bulk T-Shirts

settings.heading: Printed shirts in production and finished customer work.
settings.intro: Real uploaded photos show green shirts in production plus bold finished shirts with detailed customer artwork.
